Notice Of Moiton And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Specially Prepared Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jun-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Scott Freedman, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Leonard Young
James Millar, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Carmen Higarda

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Leonard Young's Motion To Compel Defendant Hegareda's Further Responses To Specially Prepared Interrogatories, Written Responses To Document Demands And Further Production Of Documents; To Compel Defendant Rodriguez's Further Responses To Specially Prepared Interrogatories, Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents And For Compliance With Document Demands is granted as the responses are incomplete. Further responses shall be made within five days of notice of this order. Defendant's request for sanctions are denied. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
